lede: A look at March 3 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Jvke and Jan-Arie van der Heijden, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: March 2013 Karachi bombing
events.desc: A bomb blast in Karachi, Pakistan, kills at least 48 people and injured 200 others in a predominantly Shia Muslim area.

events.title: United Airlines Flight 585
events.desc: United Airlines Flight 585 crashes on its final approach to Colorado Springs killing everyone on board.

events.title: Apollo program
events.desc: Apollo program: NASA launches Apollo 9 to test the lunar module.

events.title: Bethnal Green tube station
events.desc: World War II: In London, 173 people are killed in a crush while trying to enter an air-raid shelter at Bethnal Green tube station.

events.title: Free State of Fiume
events.desc: The Free State of Fiume is annexed by the Kingdom of Italy.

events.title: Woman Suffrage Procession
events.desc: Thousands of women march in the Woman Suffrage Procession in Washington, D.C.

events.title: Shoshone National Forest
events.desc: Shoshone National Forest is established as the first national forest in the US and world.

events.title: Great Slave Auction
events.desc: The two-day Great Slave Auction, one of the largest such auctions in United States history, concludes.

events.title: Continental Army
events.desc: American Revolutionary War: The Continental Army is routed at the Battle of Brier Creek near Savannah, Georgia.

events.title: American Revolutionary War
events.desc: American Revolutionary War: The first amphibious landing of the United States Marine Corps begins the Battle of Nassau.

births.name: Laura Harring
births.line: Mexican-American model and actress, Miss USA 1985

births.name: Alexander Graham Bell
births.line: Scottish-American engineer and academic, invented the telephone (died 1922)

deaths.text: Kenzaburō Ōe, Japanese novelist, 1994 Nobel Prize laureate in Literature
Luis Marden, American linguist, photographer, and explorer

observances.text: Christian feast day: Anselm, Duke of Friuli
Christian feast day: John and Charles Wesley (Episcopal Church (USA))
Christian feast day: Marinus and Asterius of Caesarea
